ogTitle: Suttontown vs Swan Reach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Suttontown and Swan Reach.
heading: Suttontown vs Swan Reach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Suttontown, South Australia and Swan Reach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swan Reach has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Suttontown (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Suttontown or Swan Reach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Suttontown has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Swan Reach scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Suttontown scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Swan Reach scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Suttontown or Swan Reach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swan Reach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
